input.content:
Subject: Scheduled System Maintenance Notification – Saturday, [Date]

Dear Valued Users,

We are writing to inform you of an important scheduled maintenance event that will take place this coming Saturday.

**Maintenance Details:**

Date: Saturday, [Date]
Time: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM (Local Time)
Duration: Approximately 4 hours

**What to Expect:**

During this maintenance window, the following services will be unavailable:
• All online systems and applications
• Web portals and dashboards
• API services
• Mobile applications

**Preparation:**

To minimize any impact on your operations, we recommend that you:
1. Complete any critical transactions before 2:00 AM on Saturday
2. Save any open work or unsaved data
3. Notify your teams of the scheduled downtime
4. Plan accordingly if your business depends on these systems

**Why This Maintenance is Important:**

This scheduled maintenance is essential for:
• System security enhancements
• Performance improvements
• Database optimization
• Critical infrastructure updates

**Support During Maintenance:**

Our technical support team will be available to assist with any urgent issues. For questions or concerns, please contact our support team at [support contact information] prior to the maintenance window.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your patience and understanding as we work to keep our systems secure and running optimally.

If you have any questions or require additional information, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

Thank you,

[Your Name/Department]
[Company Name]
[Contact Information]

final_response:
Perfect! I've drafted a professional email notification about scheduled maintenance and saved it to `/workspace/maintenance-email.txt`. 

The email includes:
- **Clear subject line** with maintenance date
- **Maintenance details** (time: 2 AM - 6 AM, duration: 4 hours)
- **Services affected** section
- **Preparation recommendations** for users
- **Reason for maintenance** to explain importance
- **Support contact information** placeholder
- **Professional closing** with customizable fields

You
